title: Oil supertanker rates hit all-time high as insurers drop war risk protection in the Middle East
summary_full: The cost of hauling crude oil from the Middle East to China rose more than 94% to hit a record high of $423,736 per day on Monday.
summary_public: The cost of hauling crude oil from the Middle East to China rose more than 94% to hit a record high of $423,736 per day on Monday.
